notes: As other have described, in the third room with candles, the game will fail to load a cutscene and instead show a black screen and break the game. However, after looking up the error "WindowsVideoMedia error 0x80004001", i found a fix. Search for "MFSolution mfplat.dll", and follow the instructions. This fixes the black screen and other than that, the game (demo) runs very well with no obvious issues in my limited testing.

Aside from that, the game seems to be running just fine.

gpu: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1070 with Max-Q Design
notes: This game needs media foundation dlls to show cutscenes which is what is causing the blackscreens people are experiencing. For me, the easiest way of getting this was using Gloriouseggrolls Proton version https://github.com/GloriousEggroll/proton-ge-custom/releases, after "installing" go to ~/.steam/root/compatibilitytools.d/Proton-4.15-GE-4/protonfixes/gamefixes, make a copy off 582010.py and rename the copy to 774361.py. First launch will take a couple off minutes as it downloads the required dlls. After doing this, the game runs just great!
title: Blasphemous

notes: Использовал Proton 4.15-GE-4 (http://bit.ly/2kh6cI6). Игра запустилась из коробки. Никаких дополнительных действий не потребовалась. Единственная проблема, зависание на катсценах. За час игры была два зависания. Проблема решалась перезапуском игры. https://youtu.be/mjmJn3ir13A
title: Blasphemous

notes:
The game installed after forcing proton version 4.11-4. If not forcing a proton version the game would just instantly finish downloading after a few kb. It started without issue and the first level loaded but after the first boss when a cut scene should play there was only a black screen which stopped progress.

I used protontricks to install mf followed by a script to register the dll's. I do not own the script and i did not create it but i will put the link here for anyone that want to try it. It worked for me..
"protontricks 774361 mf"
https://www.dropbox.com/s/cvl5hdji29jirz4/Blasphemous_fix.7z?dl=0
Download and extract the archive then open terminal and cd into the extracted directory then run. 
"WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/774361/pfx sh reg.sh"
The game seems to run without issue after these steps.
title: Blasphemous

notes: Works flawlessly with the Media Foundation workaround: https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install
title: Blasphemous

notes:
Needs the MediaFoundation DLL overrides. Tested with a non-legit version. Had to set the WINEPREFIX environment variable to the prefix directory created by the game setup in steamapps/compatdata and run the override script from a directory created by cloning the github repository for the MediaFoundation DLL override.

This one worked for me.
https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install

Great game. Nice mechanics and artwork. I've uninstalled for now and will purchase once the devs finish their Linux port, out of respect for their effort to at least have one.
title: Blasphemous

notes: Besides wined3d11, dsound and some video codecs are needed to play. I decided better safe than sorry so I installed the "all codecs" and "mf" with winetricks and then I installed the mf .dlls through the script provided in a previous report anyway. Some of it is probably not needed but I have gone through 40% of the game and it hasn't given me a single problem since I installed those.
title: Blasphemous

notes: Game attempts to download a native Linux version which doesn't exist yet, so you have to manually set the game to use Proton. Got the cut scenes working using the fixes mentioned below. Install wineticks/protontricks mf to Proton prefix (774361), then run the dll registration script on the same prefix (https://www.dropbox.com/s/cvl5hdji29jirz4/Blasphemous_fix.7z?dl=0).
title: Blasphemous

notes:
As other have stated, works without issue after applying the media foundation fix found here: "https://github.com/z0z0z/mf-install".  

Note this script only worked for me after I installed wine64 on my system ("sudo apt install wine64").  Without this, I was getting the "is a 64-bit installation, it cannot be used with a 32-bit wineserver" error when running the script.
title: Blasphemous
